title: Malty Creamy Basque Eggplant Paella
description: A nostalgic Spanish Basque dish featuring eggplant, malty and creamy, made with whole30-friendly ingredients and served in a crispy ensaimada bread form.

ingredients.name: basque malts
ingredients.notes: available at specialty stores or online

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth, water, and basque malts, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Meanwhile, toast the ensaimada bread in a toaster or oven until crispy.
To assemble the dish, place a scoop of the eggplant mixture onto the toasted ensaimada bread, followed by a sprinkle of caramelized onion and garlic, and finish with a sprinkle of fresh parsley.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of eggplant on top.
